amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 29 — paragraph 5 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 29 — paragraph 5 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

5 a. Prior to putting into service or use a high-risk AI system at the workplace, deployers shall consult workers representatives with a view to reaching an agreement in accordance with Directive 2002/14/EC and inform the affected employees that they will be subject to the system.
parliament_text: 5 a. Prior to putting into service or use a high-risk AI system at the workplace, deployers shall consult workers representatives with a view to reaching an agreement in accordance with Directive 2002/14/EC and inform the affected employees that they will be subject to the system.
